resources.string:
This program was developed to keep alive the memory of one of the heroes of the war between Kurdish freedom guerrillas and the Turkish state: Şehid Gabar Botan - Abdurrahim Erzen, a member of the Şehid Delil State Command on the Rojava side of Zap and the fedai commander of Hêzên Taybet.
The GPG Gabar program is based on PGP (Pretty Good Privacy) and is designed to work easily and securely on ANDROID phones and tablets. The main goal of the program is for users to securely encrypt and decrypt their files and texts. All features have been thoroughly tested to provide high trust and performance.
For top-level security, the key user\'s password must be very strong and consist of at least 100 characters. Passwords that do not meet this requirement are not accepted by the app.
We hope this program helps you develop secure communication and manage encrypted data.
The GPG Gabar program was prepared by the Cybergah Group.
We wish all users success…
Use Encrypt, Decrypt, or encrypt a text file\u2019s content.\nCreate or import a key first.\nUse Export to share your public key.

1) Enter a name.
2) Set a password with at least 100 characters.
3) Create the key and keep the password safe.

Do not share the password.

1) Select one or more .asc key files.
2) The app detects public and secret keys.
3) Enter the password if requested.
4) The key is added to the list automatically.

1) Select the key(s) to export.
2) Choose public only or public + secret.
3) Choose a destination.
4) Enter the passphrase if requested.
5) Files are saved as name-public.asc and name-secret.asc.

1) Select a file to encrypt.
2) Select one or more public keys.
3) Choose where to save the encrypted output.
4) The output is saved as a .gpg file.

To decrypt, you need the matching secret key and passphrase.

1) Select a .gpg or .pgp file.
2) The app searches for and detects the private key (if available) and guides the decryption process.
3) If the key is saved in the app, it will not ask for the password.
4) Choose where to save the decrypted file.

1) Write text or open a text file.
2) Select key(s).
3) Encrypt or decrypt the text.
4) Enter the password if requested.

Save stores the current text as a .txt file.

1) Select the keys you want to delete.
2) Confirm deletion.

Note: This cannot be undone.
A key with the same name already exists
Select at least one public key for encryption
Select a public key for encryption:
Select a private key for decryption:
Both public and secret keys detected
The selected file is not a valid public key
Secret key found, but no public key was found in the same file
Incorrect passphrase or the key could not be unlocked
Please enter a name and password
Password must be at least 100 characters
Select a key to export the public key:
What would you like to export for "%1$s"?
Delete the key named "%1$s"? This cannot be undone.
Delete %1$d keys? This cannot be undone.
All key records will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
The selected file is not a valid encrypted file
The selected key is not valid for this file
A matching secret key was found for this file, but a passphrase is required
Please use the language options below
